case_title: PHAM, THANG et al VS GUEVARRA, NICOMEDES MERCADO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $702.83 FILED BY PHAM, THANG DIRN, GUENTER AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARRA, NICOMEDES MERCADO LANCER INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAM, THANG DIRN, GUENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUEVARRA, NICOMEDES MERCADO LANCER INSURANCE COMPANY DEFT. LANCER INSURANCE COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WIAVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
